text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: "Econometric Analysis" by William H. Greene, published by Prentice Hall, is a well-established and widely verified textbook that has gone through multiple editions (including a 5th edition around 2002–2003). The automated checker's "mismatches" appear to be erroneous — the author, title, and venue all match the real book. The cited year of 2003 is close to the actual 5th edition (2002), which is an acceptable minor discrepancy.
LINK: https://www.abebooks.com/9780130661890/Econometric-Analysis-Greene-William-H-0130661899/plp
